title: Ackee and Mediterranean Papillote
description: A flavorful and flavorful dish made with ackee, Mediterranean herbs, and a hint of crispy texture.
instructions: In a bowl, combine ackee, Mediterranean herbs, crab meat (if using), lemon juice, and olive oil. Season with salt and pepper to taste.
Roll out the tender pastry to a large sheet, about 1/4-inch thick.
Spoon the ackee mixture onto one half of the pastry, leaving a 1-inch border around the edges.
Fold the other half of the pastry over the filling, pressing the edges to seal.
Place the papillote on a baking sheet lined with parchment paper.
Bake for 20-25 minutes, or until the pastry is golden brown and the filling is heated through.
Serve hot, garnished with additional Mediterranean herbs if desired.
